Title: Establishes the crime of aggravated distracted driving and provides that such crime shall be a misdemeanor
Summary: Establishes the crime of aggravated distracted driving; provides that such crime shall be a misdemeanor; requires the motor vehicle operator's driver's license to be revoked; provides that the registration may be revoked.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the vehicle and traffic law, in relation to the operation of a motor vehicle while using mobile telephones or portable electronic devices
